reason: Add Duration, Option, Schedule, Semaphore imports for timeout, retry, and concurrency features
Add error hierarchy: ToolError base + TimeoutError, TransientError, ValidationError subtypes
Extend Def with full reliability field types: cacheable object, timeout as DurationInput, retry config object, maxConcurrency, errorTaxonomy
Upgrade wrap() with per-tool semaphore, retry+exponential backoff, timeout, memory limit, richer span attributes via annotateCurrentSpan
Fix circular getter reference by using 'detail' instead of 'message' field in error classes. TimeoutError get message() constructs from tool+duration+detail without calling itself.
Fix type name: Duration.DurationInput → Duration.Input per effect v4 API
Fix Duration.DurationInput → Duration.Input in wrap function
